name: testWaitScopeGetConfigurationInformation
title: testWaitScopeGetConfigurationInformation
syntax: long testWaitScopeGetConfigurationInformation (char deviceNames[][], dword deviceCount, char configurationNames[][], dword configurationCount);
description: Returns the available oscilloscopes and possible configurations.
The returned device names and function can be used with the function testWaitScopeSetConfiguration.

parameters.name: deviceNames
parameters.description: The names of the scope device.

parameters.name: deviceCount
parameters.description: [in] The number of scope devices requested [out] The number of available scope devices

parameters.name: configurationNames
parameters.description: The configuration names of all available configurations.

parameters.name: configurationCount
parameters.description: [in] The number of requested configurations [out] The number of available configurations

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
